<!-- Thanks for contributing to pensiv-plugins! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New plugin / plugin change (`plugins/*`)
- [ ] SDK / build-config / plugin-ui / scaffold change (`packages/*`)
- [ ] Tooling / CI / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if a publishable package changed
- [ ] Did **not** hand-edit `packages/plugin-sdk/src` (it is mirror-generated)
